expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs link command (not jira.mjs create) for document-based creation
expectations.evidence: Does not use sync.mjs. Uses MCP tools (createJiraIssue). States 'Without a dedicated Atlassian skill, there is no sync.mjs helper script.'
No sync.mjs is used. MCP tool call uses projectKey: 'DO' rather than CLI flags.

expectations.text: Checks for field mapping file (memory/jira-story-field-mapping.json) before creating
expectations.evidence: States 'Without a skill, the agent has no knowledge of this mapping file and must guess the field mapping.' Does not check for the mapping file.

expectations.text: If no mapping exists, runs sync.mjs setup-mapping or proceeds with defaults
expectations.evidence: States 'A dedicated skill would run sync.mjs setup-mapping if no mapping exists' but the without-skill approach does not do this.

expectations.text: The source document is updated with jira_ticket_id in frontmatter or [KEY] prefix in title
expectations.evidence: Step 7: 'Adding jira_ticket_id: DO-123 to the YAML frontmatter, or Prefixing the title with the ticket key (e.g., [DO-123]), or Both' — the approach describes doing this manually.

expectations.text: A sync state file is created in memory/sync-state/
expectations.evidence: States 'Without a skill, the agent has no concept of sync state and will not create this file.'

expectations.text: If mapping has non-empty instructions field, prints them to stdout
expectations.evidence: States 'Without a skill, this step is completely skipped.'
